title: Fried Floral Delight
description: A crispy and sweet dessert made with fried floral petals. Perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Floral petals
ingredients.notes: Use edible flowers like rose or lavender

ingredients.name: Stir-fry spice
ingredients.notes: A blend of spices like cinnamon and cardamom

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together the floral petals and sugar.
2. Add the stir-fry spice and mix well.
3. Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. When the oil is hot, add the floral mixture and fry until crispy.
5. Remove the fried petals from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the chewy rice cereal and a pinch of sugar.
7. Coat the fried petals in the cereal mixture.
